title: 107. Abracadabra – börsen trollar vidare
summary_md:
# 107. Abracadabra – börsen trollar vidare

**Feed**: borssurr  
**Published**: 2026-06-12  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

A wide-ranging Swedish market podcast covering the euphoric pre-IPO hype around SpaceX, a sharp pullback in semiconductors, rising oil/inflation pressures, and a revival of serial-acquirer holding companies. The hosts are structurally bullish on the electricity/heat-pump theme (Nibe, Beijer Ref, cabling) while skeptical of stretched valuations (Sivers, SpaceX) and cautious on highly leveraged real estate. Mood is risk-on but nervous.

---

## Universe Stocks

### ⛔ SIVE — Sivers Semiconductors | **AVOID** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 60%

Stock priced on pipeline/dreams; first near-real order triggered a ~15% drop, exposing a valuation far above what actual order intake justifies.

#### Reasoning

Hosts highlight the irony that Sivers rallies on hopes but falls when concrete (modest) orders arrive, anchoring reality. They argue the valuation is far from being justified by the type of orders the company can realistically win, implying downside as the dream narrative meets reality.

#### Sell Triggers

- if a genuinely large order materializes and is sustained
- if revenue scales to justify the multiple

> *"När det kommer något som ser ganska bra ut så faller liksom aktien 15% efter det... värderingen är väldigt långt ifrån vad som motiveras av den typ av order man faktiskt verkligen kan ta in."*

---

### 🟠 NIBE-B — Nibe | **WATCH** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 60%

Structural European electricity-demand growth and rising gas/power costs make heat pumps attractive; bad for consumers but good for Nibe.

#### Reasoning

Hosts cite Goldman Sachs' structural power-demand thesis and Carrier's view that the European heat-pump market is at a turning point. Higher gas/electricity prices and a hot El-Nino summer push consumers toward heat pumps, a direct tailwind for Nibe.

#### Sell Triggers

- if energy prices fall sharply
- if heat-pump demand stalls

> *"Det här är dåligt för konsumenten, men det är bra för Nibe."*

---

### 🟠 BEIJ-B — Beijer Ref | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 50%

Cooling/refrigeration play that should benefit from rising heat and the broader ventilation/cooling theme on the Stockholm exchange.

#### Reasoning

Within the electrification/heat theme, hosts note Beijer Ref works with cooling and should also benefit from hotter weather, alongside ventilation names. Mentioned positively but without strong conviction.

#### Sell Triggers

- if cooling/HVAC demand weakens
- if margins compress on costs

> *"Det borde kunna vara bra för Bayer Ref också, som också jobbar med kylning."*

---

### 🟠 SYSR — Systemair | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 50%

Surged on its report earlier in the week; flagged as a possible 'cool' winner within the ventilation theme.

#### Reasoning

Hosts note Systemair rushed higher on its report and suggest the rotation from electricity into heat-pumps and ventilation could produce winners. Observational rather than a strong call.

#### Sell Triggers

- if subsequent reports disappoint
- if ventilation demand cools

> *"Jag noterade att Systemair rusade på sin rapport tidigare i veckan."*

---

### 🟡 VOLV-B — Volvo | **HOLD** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 50%

Cost/transport inflation pressuring margins (stock -4% on CMD), but underlying truck and equipment demand remains strong; no construction spin-off.

#### Reasoning

At its capital markets day Volvo flagged real cost increases hitting the business, sending the stock down up to 4%, but demand for trucks and equipment stays strong. Hosts expect the move to calm and partly reverse; mildly disappointed there will be no construction-equipment spin-off.

#### Sell Triggers

- if demand for trucks/equipment softens
- if cost inflation accelerates

> *"Volvo sänkte börskursen med som mest 4%. Jag tror att det lugnar sig och reverseras lite grann idag."*

---

### 🟡 ATCO-A — Atlas Copco | **HOLD** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 50%

Longest negative report-reaction streak in years and slowing organic growth, but +350% over 10 years and partial AI exposure; quality should recover.

#### Reasoning

Hosts note the CEO's last eight reports all saw the stock fall — an unusually long negative streak — and Investor's organic growth is braking in key segments. Yet they remain fans of the culture and expect a good company to come back over time.

#### Sell Triggers

- if organic growth keeps deteriorating
- if margin/order trends weaken further

> *"Det här är den längsta negativa sviten för Atlas Copco på mycket, mycket länge... bra bolag kommer väl tillbaka får man väl ändå hoppas."*

---

### 🟠 STOR-B — Storskogen | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 50%

After the 2020-21 acquirer bust, Storskogen is now cleaned up and arguably looks reasonably cheap amid a holding-company revival.

#### Reasoning

Hosts observe a revival of holding/serial-acquirer companies and say Storskogen has been tidied up, with a case that it now looks reasonably cheap — though they remain wary of how such acquirers fare in a real downturn.

#### Sell Triggers

- if a genuine recession forces serial dilutive rights issues
- if rates rise and leverage bites

> *"Storskogen är ju städat och man kan gärna argumentera för att det ser hyggligt billigt ut."*

---

### 🟠 TSLA — Tesla | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 40%

Speculative concern that the SpaceX share offering could drain capital from the same investor crowd that holds Tesla.

#### Reasoning

Hosts speculate that money may be pulled from other assets to buy highly valued SpaceX shares, and that this could weigh on Tesla since it is likely the same investor crowd. Explicitly framed as speculation.

#### Sell Triggers

- if SpaceX capital-raising proves additive rather than cannibalizing

> *"Det här borde ju kunna slå mot Teslas aktie till exempel. Där kan man ju tänka sig att det verkligen är samma crowd."*

---

### 🟠 ERIC-B — Ericsson | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 40%

Speculative concern that SpaceX/Starlink is good enough to replace traditional mobile-network demand, hurting Ericsson.

#### Reasoning

Hosts toss out, as a 'spaning', that Starlink could erode demand for traditional mobile networks and thus weigh on Ericsson. Low-conviction, exploratory idea.

#### Sell Triggers

- if satellite connectivity proves complementary rather than substitutive to mobile networks

> *"Det finns en snackis om att Ericsson skulle kunna må dåligt av SpaceX för att Starlink är så bra och ersätter den traditionella mobilnäts..."*

---

### ⛔ ORCL — Oracle | **AVOID** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 45%

Highly leveraged AI-hype beneficiary; raising capital in various ways and sold off after its report.

#### Reasoning

Hosts describe Oracle as a fairly highly leveraged company that has been right in the AI hype but is now talking about raising capital and traded down after reporting — fitting a pattern of funding AI capex over buybacks, which they view cautiously.

#### Sell Triggers

- if AI capex returns disappoint
- if leverage becomes a concern as rates stay high

> *"Ganska högt skuldsatt bolag som legat helt rätt i AI-hypen. Pratar också om att ta in pengar på olika sätt och handlas ner lite grann."*

---
